title: sql.execute params
description: Parameters for the sql.execute RPC method

sql.description: SQL statement to execute (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, MERGE, WITH)

params.description: Named parameters for the SQL statement (e.g. { "id": 1 })

client_token.description: Opaque token (hex) or JWT for authorization. Required when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active. Aliases: clientToken, auth

idempotency_key.description: Unique key for request deduplication. When enableSocketIdempotency is active, duplicate keys return cached response (TTL 5min)

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows to return

page.description: 1-based page number for paginated SELECT execution

page_size.description: Maximum number of rows to return for the current page

cursor.description: Opaque continuation cursor returned in result.pagination.next_cursor

multi_result.description: Enables multi-result execution for SQL batches that can return multiple result sets. Cannot be combined with pagination or named parameters.
